# netbox_ip_address (Resource)

Manages a NetBox IP address.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Explicit address
resource "netbox_ip_address" "basic" {
  address = "10.0.0.1/24"
}

# Auto-allocate from a prefix
resource "netbox_prefix" "pool" {
  prefix = "10.10.0.0/24"
}

resource "netbox_ip_address" "auto" {
  autoassign       = true
  parent_prefix_id = netbox_prefix.pool.id
  dns_name         = "web01.example.com"
  description      = "Auto-allocated address"
}

# Idempotent allocation (autoassign + upsert)
resource "netbox_ip_address" "auto_upsert" {
  autoassign       = true
  upsert           = true
  parent_prefix_id = netbox_prefix.pool.id
  dns_name         = "mgmt01.example.com"
  description      = "Re-uses existing IP if dns_name already present in prefix"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `address` (String) IP address with prefix length (e.g., '10.0.0.1/24'). Computed when autoassign is true.
- `autoassign` (Boolean) If true, automatically allocate an IP address from `parent_prefix_id` using `POST /api/ipam/prefixes/{id}/available-ips/`. Requires `parent_prefix_id` to be set.
- `comments` (String) Additional comments.
- `description` (String) Description of the IP address.
- `dns_name` (String) DNS name for this IP address. Used as the primary match key when `autoassign` and `upsert` are both true.
- `parent_prefix_id` (Number) Parent prefix ID to allocate from when `autoassign` is true.
- `tags` (Attributes List) Tags associated with this IP address. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))
- `tenant` (Number) Tenant ID that owns this IP address.
- `upsert` (Boolean) If true, will find and use existing IP address with matching address instead of creating a new one. When combined with `autoassign`, matches within the parent prefix by `dns_name` (if set) or tenant+tags.
- `vrf` (Number) VRF ID that contains this IP address.

### Read-Only

- `address` (String) Computed IP address (populated by NetBox when `autoassign` is true).
- `id` (String) NetBox internal ID.

<a id="nestedatt--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Required:

- `name` (String) Tag name.
- `slug` (String) Tag slug.
